title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
